/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN & SAW/FTRRECORDED/INTC/BWDNC/SAWD/ORNAS/X:DEFENDANT MUST ABIDE BY STAY AWAY ORDER IN PLACE/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE,THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSOCOMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THATTIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOPU:NO VIOLATIONS/

/FTRRECORDED/CAL:TRIAL, ACM ICR, PD MOTION TO RELEASE/LD:05-20-22/INTC/X:PEOPLE APPEARED VIA ZOOM,/MO GRTD/X:SANTOS DZUL, DEFENDANT'S BROTHER WASSWORN AND ASSISTED BY A SPANISH INTERPRETER, MONICA HERNANDEZ,/ACM/X:AS ACONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BYTHE SFSO/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD:DEFENDANT NOT TO COME TO SF UNLESS FOR COURT HEARING; TO DO 2 N,A, PER WEEK; STAY WITH BROTHER/CTORD:DEFENDANT NOT TO CONSUME ANY ALCOHOL, MARIGUANAOR NON-PRESCRIPTED DRUG; ABIDE STAY AWAY ORDER/CAUSE1/X:A COVID ORDER ISSIGNED AND FILE,/CONTD:TRIAL AND PROOF OF 2 N,A,/DOPU:PROOF/

/FTRRECORDED/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE FILED ON 04-07-22/INTC/MO GRTD/X:CONSOLIDATE MISDEMEANOR COMPLAINT FILED/FAWC/IRRC/LDTR:05-20-22/X:REMAINS FOR ALL CASES,/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIALDIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 05-12-22/X:JURY TRIAL ON 05-06-22 IS CONFIRMED/DOP/
